# `SetMultiColorMode`

**Systems:** C64, MEGA65, C128  
**Parameters:** `—`

---

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<p>Sets 160x200 multicolor mode on the C64 / C128 and the Plus/4.


</div>
